'''''Challenge'' 60''' was a roleplaying magazine from May of [[1992]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including a rules supplement for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Character Templates]]" and was written by [[Chris Hind]].
